---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for Jingle
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is blocked or unnecessarily hard?

## Proposed Direction

What should Jingle do differently?

## Owner Boundary

Which part of the system probably owns this?

- launcher or desktop window
- agent runtime, approvals, checkpoints, or memory
- extension SDK or installable extension
- model/provider integration
- docs, releases, or project operations

## Raycast Comparison

If this overlaps with a Raycast workflow, what should Jingle match and where
should it go further?

## Context

Links, screenshots, examples, or constraints.
